话题 1: 科技Task: 未来是否没有人会购买印刷报纸和书籍Task: 维护公共图书馆是否是浪费金钱和时间Task: 是否应该接受没有科技的简单生活Task: 智能设备带来了更多坏处Task: 科技进步带来了更多坏处话题 2: 法律Task: 少年犯罪是否和成人同罚Task: 提供高等教育是否比监禁更能预防犯罪Task: 从良的前罪犯是教育青少年的最好人选Task: 公开审判是否利大于弊Task: 延长监禁和其他方法哪个能阻止犯罪Task: 科技发展减少还是促进了犯罪话题 3: 文化和社会Task: 名人支持国际援助组织带来帮助还是坏处Task: 人们是否应该出国旅游了解其他国家Task: 组团旅游流行对目的地的人们和环境是好是坏Task: 老人和年轻人哪个更重要Task: 老年人的建议对当代年轻人有用吗Task: 乡村人口向城市迁移Task: 新建住宅还是修复老建筑Task: 越来越多人对了解他们居所的历史感兴趣的原因和了解的方法Task: 政府应该为穷人提供免费住房吗Task: 发达国家应该向人们引入新的科技还是提供免费的教育以提高生活质量Task: 是否应该频繁换工作Task：工作是否应该去大公司Task：年轻人应该遵循社会传统还是自由探索Task：诉诸失业还是继续干不喜欢的工作Task：最主要让人们快乐的方式是拥有很多钱Task：种族融合的原因和利弊Task：经济发展和其他进步哪个更重要Task：早年就对自己的职业路径做决定是否会有一个更满足工作生涯Task：给未来做计划还是关注现在Task：竞争是好是坏Task：第一印象是好事还是坏事话题 4: 教育Task：大学生是否应该学习主科之外的科目Task：接受还是克服逆境Task：教育儿童努力就能成功的优劣Task：儿童依赖手机的原因Task：社区的志愿工作应该成为高中教育的一部分Task：中学生是否应该学习国际新闻Task：上大学会促进社会进步还是导致失业Task：野心对成功有多重要Task：间隔年利弊Task：大学教育是帮助学生就业还是促进个人发展话题 5: 体育Task：国家鼓励重大赛事还是鼓励孩子从小参加体育运动Task：团队运动和个人运动哪个更好Task：极限运动是否应该被禁止话题 6: 广告和娱乐Task：新闻和媒体是否对我们生活有积极影响Task：广告在劝说我们购买商品方面很成功，还是被我们视而不见Task：广告是否让人们不满足于自己的身份和拥有的东西Task：新闻和媒体对我们的生活有正面还是负面影响Task：广告对我们生活的影响Task：广告强调商品是新颖的Task：社交网站对人们和社会带来了负面影响话题 7: 能源和环保Task：环境问题对是否需要个体的参与Task：企业和个人是否应该付费清污Task：野生动物濒临灭绝Task：企业是否该对环境问题负责Task：水的使用应该被限制吗Task：生产和消费商品造成环境破坏话题 8: 艺术Task：鼓励学校还是社区发展体育和艺术Task：博物馆和画廊是否还需要话题 9: 交通Task：使用自行车做交通工具越来越少Task：新建高铁还是提升现有公共交通Task：提高最小驾驶年龄是否可以改善道路安全话题 10: 食物Task：各国粮食是否应该自给自足Task：不健康的食物应不应该被禁止Task：尽管农业进步很多人也还是需要忍受饥饿Task：现代社会是否不再需要动物制品

IELTS WRITING TASK 2

大作文范文库

5.0

IEL TS llEMEDIES

大作文范文库

大作文全类型

10大话题分类

68篇高分范文

巳 对应高级词组

更适合中国宝宝体质

雅思写作的信息差，关于我最常被问到的 5 个问题的回答：

Q1: 为什么很多题目要求举例子，但是不举例子的文章也可以拿到高分，举例子是必要的吗？

A: 近几年考雅思的人越来越多，有一些老师为了保证教学方法的适用性会教学生使用模版化的结构。甚至有的学生为了省时间会背诵万能模版。雅思写作出题者为了甄别这些用模版的人，要求写作举例子。如果你尝试过用模版你就会知道模版里一般不会出现回应具体话题的例子，因为一旦有了就不万能了，也就失去模版的意义了

这就是说，考官其实不是真的想看你的例子，很多时候反而是通过这个东西来辅助判断你是不是背诵的。如果你的文章写得不错，内容上也不会被误以为有模版痕迹，即使没有例子某些程度上也是可以接受的。

此外就是很多同学认为只有“For example,”之后的内容才算例子，其实不是的，这只是一个提示词。例证也是论证的一种，很多文章在论证里已经使用了例子，只是没有提示你。比如，一篇说全球商品同质化的作文，作者写到： “消费者可以以更低廉的价格买到需要的产品。因为很多制造商为了在这种同质化竞争中胜出，不得不在保证产品质量的同时降低价格。”这是在真实世界中发生的事，是一种例子。

Q2: 为什么我写文章很快，40 分钟能写 400 个词左右，还是不能获得高分？

A: 你需要了解雅思写作评分的方式，雅思写作是扣分制而不是加分。这就是说每篇文章在考官开始批改之前，四项都是 9 分的满分，然后每当你的文章里有一项出现足够多的问题，会给你对应的项扣掉 1 分。这样的问题就是，你超出要求多写的部分，观点有效，论证完整令人信服，语法句型丰富用词准确，也只能保证你不扣分，是不会给你加分的，所以会比较吃亏。

其次就是文章写太多词有时候是比较口语化的原因，有时候是一些内容在含义上不断重复。这样会被认为是缺乏总结提炼观点和清晰表达的能力，对你文章的 CC 会有影响。根据经验判断，一般写太多词的文章都会掉 0.5 分左右，通常是连贯性不佳或者语法错误多了。推荐长度在 250 到 300 词之间，一般最多不要超过 350。

Q3: 为什么我背了高级词汇也用了，写作分数还是没有变高呢？对我的 LR 的分数会有提升吗？

A: 取决于你是怎么定义高级词汇的。大部分情况下，同学们一般都是觉得我背了某个词的不常用同义词就是高级词汇了，其实不一定的。

假设这么一个情况：你的词汇量不足，但是还可以维持基本表达。这个情况下很多东西为了描述准确就需要你用很多简单词来组成句子描述。比如“醍醐灌顶”，通常你说这个词大家就知道你要表达的意思了，但是如果你不会这个词，就会需要一个的句子来解释这四个字包含的意思。所以给 LR 贡献分数的词是这种描述准确的词，并不是大家认为的不常见词这种所谓高级。同意替换是为了让你换掉在你文章中重复出现的词。

判断一个词对你的 LR 有没有贡献，你可以评估一下这个词是不是可以有效地传递你的观点并且让你的句子变得简洁清晰了。

Q4: 观点，论证的顺序可以改变吗？可以先写论证再写观点吗？

A: 不推荐。英语的语言习惯是把重要的信息在一开始说，然后再对其解释论证。比如中文你会说：一个穿着漂亮衣服的小女孩。英语里习惯的语序是：一个小女孩，穿着花衣服。不只是句子，段落也是这样，这就要求你在段落开始的主题句说清楚你的观点，然后再对其论证。

如果你的主题句没有表达观点，一开始就在论证，论证到最后总结你的观点，通常都会有一定程度上的丢分。这是因为段落开头陈述观点更符合英文的语言习惯，且考官会对你要写的东西有一个大致的预测，接下来他会去评估你的论证有没有支撑力，一整个是符合他最舒适的工作路径的。相反，一开始论证却在段落结尾给出观点，考官带着疑问去读你的论证，最后读到观点可能已经不是太记得清你论证了什么了，这个时候一般是不会再倒回去读你的论

证了，还有更不妙的情况，就是他读完之后自己总结出来的观点和你总结出来的差异非常大，这样肯定会造成丢分。

Q5: 关注话题之外，不同题目问法重要吗？

A: 当然重要，话题是雅思写作的基础和核心，你的观点和思辨都需要和话题结合，向考官展示你对这类话题内容的积累和你自己的看法。但是不同题目问法决定了你的文章需要回应什么东西，可以说题目的问法决定了题目的骨架，话题对应的观点和解释则是骨架上的肉。另外，答非所问也是考官判定你是不是用了模版的一个重要指标。如果题目中问的内容没有回应全面，就会造成丢分，具体来说，每种题目的回答方式都有差异，可以参考下面这张思维导图，例举了各类题型的文章结构和你需要回应的点：

话题 1: 科技

Task: 未来是否没有人会购买印刷报纸和书籍

In the future, nobody will buy printed newspapers or books because they will be able to read everything they want online without paying.

To what extent do you agree or disagree with this statement?

The digital revolution has profoundly impacted the way we consume information and literature, sparking debates about the future of printed materials. There is a statement that, in the future, printed newspapers and books will become relics of the past, as people will prefer to read everything online for free. I strongly agree with this viewpoint, as digital platforms offer unparalleled convenience, accessibility, and a wealth of resources that far exceed the capabilities of traditional print media.

数字革命深刻影响了我们消费信息和文学的方式，引发了关于印刷材料未来的争论。有一种

说法认为，未来，纸质报纸和书籍将成为历史，因为人们将更愿意在网上免费阅读所有内容。我非常同意这种观点，因为数字平台提供了无与伦比的便利性、可访问性和丰富的资源，远远超出了传统印刷媒体的能力。

The primary reason supporting the dominance of online reading is its cost-effectiveness and accessibility. Online content does not require physical production, eliminating the need for paper and ink, which significantly reduces costs. As a result, publishers can offer a wide array of content for free or at a lower price, making it affordable for a broader audience. Unlike printed books, which often come with high price tags, online reading provides access to an extensive range of information and knowledge without financial burden. Therefore, it is highly likely that readers will lean towards online platforms for their reading needs.

支持在线阅读占主导地位的主要原因是其成本效益和可访问性。在线内容不需要实体制作，

无需纸张和墨水，从而大大降低了成本。因此，出版商可以免费或以较低的价格提供各种各样的内容，让更广泛的受众能够负担得起。与通常价格昂贵的纸质书籍不同，在线阅读可以让人们获得广泛的信息和知识，而无需承担经济负担。因此，读者很可能会倾向于使用在线平台来满足他们的阅读需求。

Moreover, The ease and flexibility offered by online reading are attractive to modern individuals leading busy lifestyles. With the rise of smartphones, tablets, and e-readers, readers can carry an entire library of books and newspapers in their pockets. This mobility allows people to read anytime and anywhere, whether on a daily commute, during travel, or simply during leisure time. In contrast, printed books are bulky and inconvenient to carry around, limiting the reading experience to specific locations and circumstances.

此外，在线阅读提供的便利性和灵活性对生活忙碌的现代人很有吸引力。随着智能手机、平

板电脑和电子阅读器的兴起，读者可以随身携带一整套书籍和报纸。这种移动性使人们可以随时随地阅读，无论是在日常通勤、旅行中还是在休闲时间。相比之下，纸质书籍体积庞大，不便于携带，将阅读体验限制在特定的地点和环境中。

In conclusion, the vast online resources provide significant benefits including cost-effectiveness, accessibility, and convenience. Therefore, it is reasonable to predict that the attraction of printed books and newspapers will diminish, as society moves towards a digital mode of consuming literature and information.

总之，丰富的在线资源提供了显著的好处，包括成本效益、可访问性和便利性。因此，随着

社会转向数字化的文学和信息消费模式，可以合理地预测，纸质书籍和报纸的吸引力将会减弱。

高分词组

digital revolution | 数字革命 profoundly impacted | 深刻影响 relics of the past | 过去的遗物

unparalleled convenience | 无与伦比的便利

wealth of resources | 丰富的资源 exceed the capabilities | 超出能力 traditional print media | 传统印刷媒体

dominance of online reading | 在线阅读的主导地位

cost-effectiveness | 成本效益 eliminating the need | 消除需求 financial burden | 经济负担

ease and flexibility | 灵活性和便利性

leading busy lifestyles | 过着忙碌的生活方式

specific locations and circumstances | 特定的地点和情况

vast online resources | 广泛的在线资源

attraction of ... will diminish | ...的吸引力将减弱

Task: 维护公共图书馆是否是浪费金钱和时间

Some people think that maintaining public libraries is a waste of time and money Because computer technologies have already replaced its function.

To what extent do you agree or disagree?

Currently, some individuals hold the view that maintaining public libraries is unnecessary as computer technologies can take their place. However, I disagree with this view as I believe public libraries have unique roles that cannot be replaced by technology.

目前，有些人认为维护公共图书馆是不必要的，因为计算机技术可以取代它们。但我不同意

这种观点，因为我认为公共图书馆具有技术无法取代的独特作用。

On one hand, people no longer need to borrow books from libraries due to the widespread availability of online reading apps. These apps allow people to access a vast array of books, articles, and other reading materials with just a few taps on their smartphones, tablets, or computers. Additionally, online reading apps often come with features such as adjustable font sizes, bookmarking, note-taking, and offline reading capabilities, enhancing the overall reading experience. As a result, the number of people visiting public libraries has significantly decreased compared to the past, leading some to support the idea of phasing out libraries.

一方面，由于在线阅读应用程序的广泛使用，人们不再需要从图书馆借书。这些应用程序允

许人们只需在智能手机、平板电脑或计算机上点击几下即可访问大量书籍、文章和其他阅读材料。此外，在线阅读应用程序通常具有可调整字体大小、书签、笔记和离线阅读等功能，可增强整体阅读体验。因此，访问公共图书馆的人数与过去相比显着减少，导致一些人支持逐步淘汰图书馆的想法。

On the other hand, there are compelling reasons to maintain public libraries. The most notable reason is the unique reading atmosphere they provide. Public libraries offer warm and comfortable lighting, quiet spaces, and thousands of books, creating an ideal environment that fosters reading motivation and concentration, especially in a society inundated with fragmented information. Moreover, public libraries offer opportunities for community engagement, allowing neighbors to socialize and build relationships, particularly among those who share a love for reading.

另一方面，维护公共图书馆有令人信服的理由。最显着的原因是它们提供的独特阅读氛围。

公共图书馆提供温暖舒适的灯光、安静的空间和成千上万的书籍，创造了一个理想的环境，可以培养阅读动机和注意力，尤其是在一个充斥着碎片化信息的社会中。此外，公共图书馆为社区参与提供了机会，让邻居们进行社交和建立关系，尤其是那些热爱阅读的人。

In conclusion, while digital reading is highly convenient in today's world, libraries continue to offer an environment that fosters better concentration. Moreover, libraries serve as valuable spaces for cultivating interpersonal communication. Therefore, I

believe maintaining public libraries is essential.

总之，虽然数字阅读在当今世界非常方便，但图书馆仍然提供了一个促进更好集中注意力的环境。此外，图书馆是培养人际交流的宝贵空间。因此，我认为维护公共图书馆至关重要。

高分词组

maintaining | 维护

unique roles | 独特的角色 widespread availability | 广泛可用 vast array of books | 大量书籍 adjustable font sizes | 可调字体大小 bookmarking | 书签功能

note-taking | 记笔记

offline reading capabilities | 离线阅读功能

enhancing the overall reading experience | 提升整体阅读体验

phasing out libraries | 逐步淘汰图书馆

compelling reasons | 有力的理由

unique reading atmosphere | 独特的阅读氛围 warm and comfortable lighting | 温暖舒适的照明 quiet spaces | 安静空间

fosters reading motivation and concentration | 培养阅读动机和集中力 inundated with fragmented information | 充斥着零碎的信息 community engagement | 社区参与

socialize and build relationships | 社交和建立关系 fosters better concentration | 促进更好的集中力 cultivating interpersonal communication | 培养人际交流

Task: 是否应该接受没有科技的简单生活

Some people say that technology makesour life too complicated today, and the solution is to accept a simple life withoutthose technologies.

To what extent do you agree or disagree?

A prevailing viewpoint suggests that technology complicates life excessively, leading some to advocate for a simpler, tech-free existence. However, I firmly disagree with this perspective as I believe technology simplifies rather than complicates life when harnessed appropriately.

一种流行的观点认为，科技使生活变得过于复杂，导致一些人提倡一种更简单、无科技的生

活。然而，我坚决不同意这种观点，因为我相信，如果加以适当利用，科技会使生活变得简单而不是复杂。

Firstly, technology predominantly facilitates convenience rather than introducing complex challenges for the average person. A prime example of this is the automation of mundane tasks. For example, delivery and household robots have become integral in urban societies, effortlessly navigating to their destinations and assisting with domestic chores. These innovations ensure that even the busiest individuals can maintain a high quality of life with minimal effort. The simplicity of operating these devices through a few taps on a mobile phone exemplifies the ease with which high-quality services are now accessible.

首先，科技主要是为了方便人们，而不是给普通人带来复杂的挑战。一个典型的例子就是日

常任务的自动化。例如，送货和家用机器人已经成为城市社会不可或缺的一部分，它们可以毫不费力地导航到目的地并协助做家务。这些创新确保即使是最忙碌的人也能以最小的努力保持高质量的生活。只需在手机上轻点几下即可操作这些设备，这体现了现在人们可以轻松获得高质量服务。

Moreover, technology is indispensable for productivity and economic growth. It acts as a catalyst in key sectors such as industry and agriculture, significantly enhancing efficiency. Through technological integration, production processes have been optimized, yielding higher outputs at lower costs. This reduction in production expenses translates to more affordable consumer goods, thereby alleviating financial burdens and enabling individuals to allocate their resources towards more fulfilling pursuits, enriching their lives beyond material concerns.

此外，技术对于生产力和经济增长不可或缺。它在工业和农业等关键领域发挥着催化剂的作

用，大大提高了效率。通过技术整合，生产流程得到了优化，以更低的成本获得了更高的产出。生产费用的减少意味着消费品更加实惠，从而减轻了经济负担，使个人能够将资源分配到更有意义的追求上，丰富他们的生活，而不仅仅是物质上的追求。

In conclusion, the assertion that technology complicates life overlooks its profound benefits in easing day-to-day tasks and bolstering economic productivity. The key lies in judicious application and utilization of technological innovations. Embracing technology

with a balanced approach can indeed simplify our lives, contrary to the argument for a technology-free existence.

总之，技术使生活复杂化的断言忽视了它在减轻日常任务和提高经济生产力方面的巨大好处。

关键在于明智地应用和利用技术创新。以平衡的方式拥抱技术确实可以简化我们的生活，这与无技术生活的论点相反。

高分词组

prevailing viewpoint | 流行观点

complicates life excessively | 过度复杂化生活

tech-free existence | 无科技生活 harnessed appropriately | 适当利用 facilitates convenience | 便利化

introducing complex challenges | 引入复杂挑战 automation of mundane tasks | 日常任务自动化 effortlessly navigating | 轻松导航

domestic chores | 家务

simplicity of operating | 操作简便

high-quality services | 高质量服务

indispensable for productivity | 对生产力不可或缺

acts as a catalyst | 起催化作用 enhancing efficiency | 提高效率 technological integration | 技术整合

optimized production processes | 优化的生产过程

yielding higher outputs | 产出更高

lower costs | 降低成本

alleviating financial burdens | 减轻财务负担

enriching lives beyond material concerns | 在物质关注之外丰富生活

judicious application | 明智应用

utilization of technological innovations | 利用技术创新

Task: 智能设备带来了更多坏处

Many people think technological devices such as smart phones, tablets and mobile phones bring more disadvantages than advantages.

To what extend do you agree or disagree?

The debate over the advantages and disadvantages of technological devices, such as smartphones, tablets, and mobile phones, remains a contentious topic. Some argue that these devices bring more harm than good. I agree with this perspective for this reliance on technology comes with significant drawbacks that affect both our physical health and social skills.

关于智能手机、平板电脑和移动电话等科技设备的优缺点的争论仍然是一个有争议的话题。

一些人认为这些设备弊大于利。我同意这种观点，因为对科技的依赖带来了重大的弊端，既影响我们的身体健康，也影响我们的社交能力。

First and foremost, the widespread use of technological devices has led to adverse effects on individuals' physical health. Modern society is increasingly dependent on these gadgets, which often result in a sedentary lifestyle. Prolonged screen time and lack of physical activity can lead to various health issues, such as eye strain, neck pain, and even obesity.

首先，科技设备的广泛使用对个人的身体健康产生了不利影响。现代社会越来越依赖这些设

备，这往往导致久坐不动的生活方式。长时间盯着屏幕和缺乏身体活动会导致各种健康问题，如眼睛疲劳、颈部疼痛甚至肥胖。

Another drawback of technology overuse is its negative impact on social skills. The widespread use of these technological gadgets like mobile phones and tablets has led to people becoming more disconnected from the present reality. Relying too much on these devices can hinder face-to-face communication and lessen the quality of social interactions in real-life situations, such as social gatherings or public events.

过度使用科技的另一个缺点是它对社交能力产生了负面影响。手机和平板电脑等科技设备的

广泛使用导致人们越来越脱离现实。过度依赖这些设备会阻碍面对面的交流，降低现实生活中社交互动的质量，如社交聚会或公共活动。

Admittedly, technological devices have revolutionized the way people entertain themselves and connect with the world. With the touch of a screen, individuals can access a wealth of information, such as news and landscapes from far-distant places, expanding their horizons and enhancing their knowledge. Moreover, these devices offer a vast array of entertainment options, ranging from movies and games to educational content. However, moderation is key. People should be mindful of excessive screen time and strive for a healthy balance between online activities and real-life experiences.

无可否认，科技设备彻底改变了人们的娱乐方式和与世界的联系。只需轻触屏幕，人们便可

获取大量信息，如远方的新闻和风景，从而拓展视野、增强知识。此外，这些设备还提供各

种各样的娱乐选择，从电影、游戏到教育内容。然而，适度才是关键。人们应注意过度使用屏幕的时间，努力在在线活动和现实生活体验之间取得健康的平衡。

To conclude, while technological devices indeed offer some conveniences and entertainment choices, the negative impacts they bring to physical health and social skills cannot be overlooked. To mitigate these drawbacks, individuals should be encouraged to limit their usage and strike a balance between the virtual and real world. 总之，虽然科技设备确实提供了一些便利和娱乐选择，但它们对身体健康和社交技能带来的负面影响也不容忽视。为了减轻这些弊端，应鼓励人们限制使用，在虚拟世界和现实世界之间取得平衡。

高分词组

technological devices | 科技设备 contentious topic | 有争议的话题 significant drawbacks | 显著缺点 physical health | 身体健康 social skills | 社交技能 widespread use | 广泛使用 adverse effects | 负面影响

sedentary lifestyle | 久坐生活方式 prolonged screen time | 长时间看屏幕 lack of physical activity | 缺乏体育活动 negative impact | 负面影响

disconnected from the present reality | 与现实脱节 hinder face-to-face communication | 阻碍面对面交流 quality of social interactions | 社交互动的质量 revolutionized | 彻底改变

wealth of information | 信息丰富 enhancing knowledge | 增进知识 moderation is key | 适度为关键

mindful of excessive screen time | 注意过度看屏幕的问题

real-life experiences | 真实生活体验

Task: 科技进步带来了更多坏处

Human society has made great technological progress in the last hunder years. Some people think this has had more negative effects on people’s lives than positive ones.

Do you agree or disagree?

In the past century, human society has witnessed remarkable technological progress across various fields. While some argue that these advancements have had predominantly negative effects on people's lives, I firmly disagree. In my view, the advantages of technological advancements, such as liberating us from monotonous tasks and enhancing healthcare services, outweigh its disadvantages.

在过去的一个世纪里，人类社会见证了各个领域的显著技术进步。虽然有人认为这些进步对

人们的生活产生了主要是负面影响，但我坚决不同意。在我看来，技术进步的优点，例如将我们从单调的任务中解放出来和增强医疗服务，超过了它的缺点。

It is true that critics point to the industrialization process driven by technological advancements, arguing that it has resulted in the exploitation of ordinary people. They contend that we now find ourselves working long hours, sacrificing our time and energy for limited financial gain while capitalists reap the majority of profits. Such disparities seem unfair and immoral. However, it is important to recognize that without technological breakthroughs, our daily work would likely be more demanding, and the same financial rewards would be harder to attain. It is the responsibility of the government to address these concerns and promote equality within our society.

批评者确实指出了技术进步推动的工业化进程，认为它导致了对普通人的剥削。他们认为，

我们现在发现自己工作时间很长，牺牲了我们的时间和精力来获得有限的经济利益，而资本家却获得了大部分利润。这种差距似乎不公平和不道德。然而，重要的是要认识到，如果没有技术突破，我们的日常工作可能会更加繁重，同样的经济回报将更难获得。政府有责任解决这些问题，促进社会平等。

From my perspective, technological progress has generally had a positive impact on modern society and people's lifestyles. Firstly, it has relieved us of repetitive tasks, allowing us to focus our energy on more challenging and meaningful work. For instance, the introduction of working software has made reporting and data visualization more convenient and visually appealing. This saves time previously spent on manual tasks such as writing and drawing, enabling us to concentrate on delivering high-quality content.

在我看来，技术进步总体上对现代社会和人们的生活方式产生了积极影响。首先，它使我们从重复性任务中解脱出来，使我们能够将精力集中在更具挑战性和意义的工作上。例如，工作软件的引入使报告和数据可视化更加方便和更具视觉吸引力。这节省了以前花在写作和绘画等手动任务上的时间，使我们能够专注于提供高质量的内容。

Furthermore, technological progress has significantly improved healthcare provision. Advances in medicine have made it possible to overcome previously untreatable diseases, offering hope and improved well-being to countless individuals. Communication devices, such as mobile phones, have revolutionized how we connect with others. They facilitate long-distance messaging, strengthening relationships within society and families, and contributing to a more interconnected world.

此外，技术进步显著改善了医疗保健服务。医学的进步使我们有可能克服以前无法治愈的疾

病，为无数人带来了希望和改善的福祉。移动电话等通信设备彻底改变了我们与他人联系的方式。它们促进了长距离信息传递，加强了社会和家庭关系，并有助于建立一个更加互联的世界。

In conclusion, it is true that technological development presents challenges such as long hours of work. However, I firmly believe that the benefits of freeing us from repetitive tasks and improving healthcare services outweigh any potential drawbacks.

总之，技术发展确实带来了长时间工作等挑战。然而，我坚信，将我们从重复性任务中解放

出来并改善医疗服务的好处大于任何潜在的弊端。

高分词组

remarkable technological progress | 显著的技术进步

liberating us from monotonous tasks | 从单调的任务中解放我们

enhancing healthcare services | 增强医疗服务 industrialization process | 工业化过程 exploitation of ordinary people | 普通人的剥削 working long hours | 长时间工作

limited financial gain | 有限的经济收益

capitalists reap the majority of profits | 资本家获得大部分利润

technological breakthroughs | 技术突破

relieved us of repetitive tasks | 解除了我们的重复任务

data visualization | 数据可视化

manual tasks | 手工任务

delivering high-quality content | 提供高质量内容

untreatable diseases | 绝症

strengthening relationships within society | 加强社会内的关系

more interconnected world | 更加互联的世界

话题 2: 法律

Task: 少年犯罪是否和成人同罚

Young people who commit serious crimes, such as a robbery or a violent attack should be punished in the same way as adults.

To what extent do you agree or disagree?

Under the higher rate of juvenile delinquency in contemporary society, there is a widespread debate about whether young criminals who commit felonies should receive the same punishment as adults. From my perspective, I firmly believe that imposing harsh punishment on these heinous young offenders is necessary. However, I also recognize the importance of considering certain special aspects of juveniles and offering rehabilitation efforts to help them reform.

在当今社会青少年犯罪率较高的背景下，人们普遍争论犯下重罪的青少年罪犯是否应受到与

成年人相同的惩罚。从我的角度来看，我坚信对这些罪大恶极的青少年罪犯施加严厉的惩罚是必要的。然而，我也认识到考虑青少年的某些特殊方面并提供改造措施以帮助他们改过自新的重要性。

Strict penalties should be applied to young lawbreakers who commit serious offenses, such as rape, robbery, and kidnapping. Punishment involving imprisonment for years, plays a vital role in deterring and disciplining offensive behavior, holding the criminals accountable for their actions. This sends a clear message to society about the severe consequences of breaking the law. Moreover, such penalties serve as a means of offering solace to the victims whose rights and well-being have been infringed.

对于犯下强奸、抢劫和绑架等严重罪行的青少年违法者，应予以严厉惩罚。多年监禁的惩罚

在阻止和约束犯罪行为、让罪犯为自己的行为负责方面起着至关重要的作用。这向社会发出了关于违法严重后果的明确信息。此外，这种惩罚也是对权利和福祉受到侵犯的受害者的一种安慰手段。

However, juveniles, as a special group, require a more well-thought-out approach to punishment, beyond merely applying the same sentences as those for adult offenders. One crucial reason is the immaturity and inadequate development of young individuals, which may result in a lack of an entire and right sense of value. Perhaps due to the absence of essential education from parents or the irrational imitation of others' evil behavior, some young people stray from the right path unconsciously. Therefore, when addressing youth crime, it is necessary to prioritize rehabilitation as a means to give them a chance to thoroughly reform themselves.

然而，青少年作为一个特殊群体，需要更加深思熟虑的惩罚方式，而不仅仅是对成年罪犯适

用相同的刑罚。一个重要原因是青少年个体的不成熟和发展不足，这可能导致缺乏完整和正确的价值观。也许由于父母缺乏必要的教育，或者非理性地模仿他人的邪恶行为，一些青少年不知不觉地偏离了正确的道路。因此，在解决青少年犯罪问题时，有必要优先考虑改造，让他们有机会彻底改过自新。

In conclusion, imposing strict penalties on juveniles who commit serious crimes is essential for deterring and preventing such offenses. However, alongside the punishment, it is crucial to prioritize rehabilitation efforts that focus on guiding these young offenders to a brighter future. This balanced approach recognizes the need to hold young criminals accountable while also acknowledging the potential for change and the importance of supporting their reintegration into society.

总之，对犯下严重罪行的青少年施加严厉的惩罚对于阻止和防止此类犯罪至关重要。然而，

除了惩罚之外，还必须优先考虑改造工作，重点是引导这些青少年罪犯走向更光明的未来。这种平衡的方法承认需要追究年轻罪犯的责任，同时也承认改变的潜力和支持他们重新融入社会的重要性。

高分词组

higher rate of juvenile delinquency | 青少年犯罪率较高

commit felonies | 犯重罪

harsh punishment | 严厉的惩罚

heinous young offenders | 极恶的青年罪犯

rehabilitation efforts | 改造的努力 serious offenses | 严重罪行 imprisonment | 监禁

deter and discipline | 震慑和管教

offensive behavior | 冒犯行为

holding criminals accountable | 让罪犯承担责任

severe consequences | 严重后果

offering solace to the victims | 为受害者提供安慰 infringed rights and well-being | 侵犯权利和幸福 well-thought-out approach | 周全的方法

immaturity and inadequate development | 不成熟和发育不全

sense of value | 价值观

irrational imitation | 不理智的模仿 stray from the right path | 偏离正道 thoroughly reform | 彻底改革

reintegration into society | 重新融入社会

Task: 提供高等教育是否比监禁更能预防犯罪

In many countries, prison is the most common solution to the problem of crime. However, another effective way is to provide people with higher education so that they will not become criminals.

To what extent do you agree or disagree?

In every society, reducing crime rates is crucial for maintaining order and harmony. While some advocate for the traditional approach of imprisoning criminals, others propose that providing higher education can effectively prevent potential offenders. In my opinion, I partially agree with this notion, as I believe a combination of both prison and education is essential for comprehensive crime prevention.

在每个社会中，降低犯罪率对于维持秩序和和谐至关重要。虽然有些人主张监禁罪犯的传统

方法，但另一些人则认为提供高等教育可以有效预防潜在犯罪者。在我看来，我部分同意这一观点，因为我相信监狱和教育的结合对于全面预防犯罪至关重要。

To begin with, prisons act as a powerful deterrent, discouraging people from engaging in criminal behavior. The confinement within prison walls imposes physical and mental hardships on prisoners, forcing them to confront the consequences of their actions. Moreover, incarcerated individuals are subjected to strict monitoring and supervision by trained personnel, making it exceedingly difficult for them to escape and commit further crimes.

首先，监狱起到了强大的威慑作用，阻止人们从事犯罪行为。监狱围墙内的监禁给囚犯带来

了身心上的折磨，迫使他们面对自己行为的后果。此外，被监禁的个人受到训练有素的人员的严格监视和监督，使他们极难逃脱并再次犯罪。

However, a solely punitive approach has its limitations. For some individuals, imprisonment might not be a sufficient deterrent, and they may reoffend after being released. This is where the role of higher education becomes crucial. By providing individuals with educational opportunities, they can improve cognitive abilities, and develop essential life skills. Education not only enables them to make informed choices but also fosters a sense of responsibility towards society, minimizing the likelihood of them becoming criminals again. A well-educated populace is more likely to contribute positively to their communities, leading to a reduction in crime rates in the long run.

然而，单纯的惩罚方法有其局限性。对于某些人来说，监禁可能不足以起到威慑作用，他们

获释后可能会再次犯罪。这就是高等教育的作用变得至关重要的地方。通过为个人提供教育机会，他们可以提高认知能力，并发展必要的生活技能。教育不仅能让他们做出明智的选择，还能培养他们对社会的责任感，最大限度地降低他们再次犯罪的可能性。受过良好教育的民众更有可能为社区做出积极贡献，从而长期降低犯罪率。

In conclusion, addressing crime requires a comprehensive and balanced approach. While prisons serve as a tangible deterrent, higher education complements this strategy by empowering individuals with knowledge and skills. Combining both measures can

create a society where individuals are less likely to resort to criminal behavior.

总之，解决犯罪问题需要采取全面而平衡的方法。虽然监狱是一种有形的威慑手段，但高等教育通过赋予个人知识和技能来补充这一战略。将这两种措施结合起来可以创造一个个人不太可能诉诸犯罪行为的社会。

高分词组

reducing crime rates | 降低犯罪率

maintaining order and harmony | 维持秩序和和谐

traditional approach | 传统方法 imprisoning criminals | 监禁罪犯 providing higher education | 提供高等教育

comprehensive crime prevention | 全面的犯罪预防

powerful deterrent | 强大的威慑

engaging in criminal behavior | 参与犯罪行为 confinement within prison walls | 监狱墙内的限制 imposes physical and mental hardships | 引起身心苦难 confront the consequences | 面对后果

strict monitoring and supervision | 严格监控和监督

punitive approach | 惩罚性方法

sufficient deterrent | 足够的威慑

reoffend after being released | 出狱后重新犯罪 improve cognitive abilities | 提高认知能力 develop essential life skills | 发展必要的生活技能 informed choices | 明智的选择

fosters a sense of responsibility | 培养责任感

well-educated populace | 受过良好教育的民众

contribute positively to their communities | 积极贡献于他们的社区

empowering individuals with knowledge and skills | 通过知识和技能赋能个人

Task: 从良的前罪犯是教育青少年的最好人选

Some people who have been in prison become good citizens later and it is often argued that these are the best people to talk to teenagers about the dangers of committing a crime.

To what extent do you agree or disagree?

In contemporary society. it is often proposed that ex-offenders, having transformed into upstanding citizens, are uniquely qualified to educate young people about the perils of criminal activity. Given the potential for effectiveness and broader societal impact, I strongly agree with this perspective.

在当代社会，人们经常认为，前罪犯已经转变为正直的公民，具有独特的资格来教育年轻人

了解犯罪活动的危险。鉴于其有效性和更广泛的社会影响，我非常同意这种观点。

Individuals who have successfully rehabilitated from crime possess the ability to counsel teenagers. Their personal narratives and genuine remorse resonate more deeply with teenagers than the abstract admonitions found in textbooks. For instance, a reformed shoplifter can vividly share the grim realities of prison life and the severity of disciplinary actions, they can deter youth from engaging in criminal behavior.

成功从犯罪中康复的人有能力辅导青少年。他们的个人叙述和真诚的悔意比教科书中的抽象

警告更能引起青少年的共鸣。例如，一个改过自新的商店扒手可以生动地分享监狱生活的残酷现实和纪律处分的严厉性，他们可以阻止青少年从事犯罪行为。

Moreover, involving rehabilitated individuals in youth education facilitates their reintegration into society. Engaging in youth education enables ex-offenders to demonstrate their transformation, fostering a sense of accomplishment. When they feel needed and are given opportunities to educate teenagers, they are likely to exert their best efforts to make a positive impact and gain societal acceptance. Furthermore, this approach helps alleviate societal biases. The public may be aware that adverse circumstances frequently contribute to criminal conduct. This helps educate the public and cultivate empathy, providing significant social benefits.

此外，让康复者参与青年教育有助于他们重新融入社会。参与青年教育使前罪犯能够展示他

们的转变，培养成就感。当他们感到被需要并有机会教育青少年时，他们很可能会尽最大努力产生积极影响并获得社会认可。此外，这种方法有助于减轻社会偏见。公众可能意识到不利环境经常会导致犯罪行为。这有助于教育公众并培养同理心，带来重大的社会效益。

While concerns exist regarding the potential for negative influence, it is imperative to afford these individuals a second chance. Environmental factors, particularly in underprivileged communities, play a significant role in shaping behavior. Viewing punishment as the sole solution overlooks the opportunity for rehabilitation and societal contribution, failing to address the root causes of criminal behavior.

虽然人们担心可能会产生负面影响，但必须给予这些人第二次机会。环境因素，特别是在贫

困社区，在塑造行为方面发挥着重要作用。将惩罚视为唯一解决方案会忽视康复和社会贡献的机会，无法解决犯罪行为的根本原因。

In conclusion, the engagement of rehabilitated offenders in educational initiatives targeting young people is not only effective but also beneficial for societal cohesion. Their firsthand experiences and transformations provide compelling lessons on the consequences of criminal actions, making them ideal candidates for this crucial educational role.

总之，让康复罪犯参与针对年轻人的教育活动不仅有效，而且有利于社会凝聚力。他们的第

一手经历和转变提供了关于犯罪行为后果的令人信服的教训，使他们成为这一关键教育角色的理想人选。

高分词组

ex-offenders | 前罪犯

upstanding citizens | 品行端正的公民

perils of criminal activity | 犯罪活动的危险 broader societal impact | 更广泛的社会影响 successfully rehabilitated | 成功改造 personal narratives | 个人叙述

genuine remorse | 真诚的悔恨

abstract admonitions | 抽象的警告

grim realities of prison life | 监狱生活的严酷现实 severity of disciplinary actions | 纪律行动的严重性 reintegration into society | 重新融入社会

societal acceptance | 社会接受 alleviate societal biases | 减轻社会偏见 adverse circumstances | 不利情况 underprivileged communities | 贫困社区 societal contribution | 社会贡献 societal cohesion | 社会凝聚力 firsthand experiences | 亲身经历 compelling lessons | 引人深思的教训

Task: 公开审判是否利大于弊

In some countries, some criminal trials in the court are shown on the TV and the general public can watch them.

Do you think the advantages outweigh the disadvantages?

In numerous nations, the practice of broadcasting criminal trials on television to the public has become commonplace. While potential downsides, such as the risk of potential criminals emulating televised methods, exist, I contend that the benefits outweigh these drawbacks, as effective management and presentation of such content can foster a law-based society.

在许多国家，向公众播放电视刑事审判的做法已变得司空见惯。虽然存在潜在的缺点，例如

潜在罪犯模仿电视手段的风险，但我认为其好处大于缺点，因为有效管理和呈现此类内容可以促进法治社会的发展。

Commencing with the potential drawbacks, the accessibility of criminal trials on television poses a unique challenge. Television's ubiquity means that anyone, including prospective wrongdoers, can access these trials without restriction. This unfettered access provides them with an array of criminal methodologies that might be replicated in their illicit activities.

首先从潜在的缺点开始，电视上刑事审判的可访问性提出了一个独特的挑战。电视的普及意

味着任何人，包括潜在的罪犯，都可以不受限制地观看这些审判。这种不受限制的访问为他们提供了一系列可能在其非法活动中复制的犯罪方法。

However, if the dissemination of information to the public is meticulously curated and accompanied by appropriate guidance, the advantages can be substantial. Criminal trials, when presented thoughtfully, can serve as a powerful deterrent, illustrating the repercussions of criminal actions and showcasing the reactions of both perpetrators and their families. This, in turn, has the potential to decrease crime rates across society.

但是，如果向公众传播信息是精心策划的，并伴有适当的指导，那么优势将是巨大的。如果

经过深思熟虑地呈现刑事审判，可以起到强大的威慑作用，说明犯罪行为的后果，并展示犯罪者及其家人的反应。这反过来又有可能降低整个社会的犯罪率。

In addition, the transparency of trials plays a pivotal role in convincing the public of the court's impartiality, thereby bolstering faith in the justice system. Equally crucial is the role of public oversight in ensuring the accuracy of legal proceedings, promoting a more robust foundation for our law-based society.

此外，审判的透明度对于让公众相信法院的公正性起着关键作用，从而增强人们对司法系统

的信心。同样重要的是，公众监督在确保法律程序的准确性方面发挥着重要作用，为我们的法治社会奠定了更坚实的基础。

In conclusion, while acknowledging the potential negative impacts of exposing criminal trials on television, I contend that the advantages of public access to criminal trials

outweigh the disadvantages. With careful curation and guidance, the influence of televised trials can be instrumental in fostering legal progress and cultivating a harmonious societal environment.

总之，虽然我承认在电视上公开刑事审判可能会产生负面影响，但我认为公众观看刑事审判

的好处大于坏处。在精心策划和指导下，电视审判的影响力可以促进法律进步，培养和谐的社会环境。

高分词组

broadcasting criminal trials | 播放刑事审判

commonplace | 常见的

risk of potential criminals emulating | 潜在犯罪者模仿的风险 effective management and presentation | 有效的管理和呈现 foster a law-based society | 促进法治社会

unfettered access | 不受限制的访问 criminal methodologies | 犯罪方法 meticulously curated | 精心策划的

repercussions of criminal actions | 犯罪行为的后果 showcasing the reactions | 展示反应 transparency of trials | 审判的透明性

court's impartiality | 法院的公正性

bolstering faith in the justice system | 增强对司法系统的信任

public oversight | 公众监督

accuracy of legal proceedings | 法律程序的准确性

robust foundation | 坚实的基础

instrumental in fostering legal progress | 促进法律进步的工具

Task: 延长监禁和其他方法哪个能阻止犯罪

Some people think the best way to reduce crime is to give longer prison sentences. Others, however, think there are better alternative ways to reduce crime.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

The issue of reducing crime has sparked a debate between those who advocate longer prison sentences and others who propose alternative approaches. While some argue for extended confinement as an effective deterrent, I firmly believe that addressing the root causes of crime through employment opportunities and education is a more viable solution for fostering a safer society.

减少犯罪的问题引发了主张延长监禁刑期的人和提出替代方法的人之间的争论。虽然有些人

认为延长监禁是一种有效的威慑手段，但我坚信通过就业机会和教育解决犯罪的根本原因是促进社会更安全更可行的解决方案。

On the one hand, supporters of longer prison sentences argue that the fear of imprisonment acts as a deterrent, reducing the likelihood of criminal behavior. However, this perspective overlooks the underlying factors that contribute to criminal activities. Simply prolonging prison sentences fails to address the circumstances that drive individuals towards illegal acts. Moreover, it does not guarantee long-term societal stability, as individuals often struggle to reintegrate into society after release, leading to higher rates of recidivism.

一方面，支持延长监禁刑期的人认为对监禁的恐惧是一种威慑，减少了犯罪行为的可能性。

然而，这种观点忽视了导致犯罪活动的根本因素。仅仅延长监禁刑期并不能解决驱使个人走向非法行为的情况。此外，它不能保证长期的社会稳定，因为个人在获释后往往很难重新融入社会，导致更高的再犯罪率。

On the other hand, some argue that there are better alternatives to reduce crime, such as investing in quality education to foster a law-abiding society. Education plays a crucial role in crime prevention. A comprehensive education system equips individuals with knowledge, critical thinking skills, and moral values, empowering them to make informed choices and navigate life's challenges.

另一方面，一些人认为有更好的减少犯罪的替代方法，比如投资优质教育来培养守法社会。

教育在预防犯罪方面起着至关重要的作用。全面的教育体系为个人提供知识、批判性思维技能和道德价值观，使他们能够做出明智的选择并应对生活中的挑战。

In my opinion, creating ample employment opportunities and improving access to education are key to preventing crime. Unemployment and financial instability have long been associated with higher crime rates, as individuals may resort to illegal means to survive. By ensuring sufficient job prospects, we can provide individuals with the means to support themselves and reduce the temptation to engage in criminal activities.

在我看来，创造充足的就业机会和改善受教育的机会是预防犯罪的关键。失业和经济不稳定

长期以来一直与高犯罪率有关，因为个人可能会诉诸非法手段来生存。通过确保足够的就业前景，我们可以为个人提供养活自己的手段，减少从事犯罪活动的诱惑。

In conclusion, while some argue for longer prison sentences as a means to reduce crime, I firmly believe that addressing the root causes of criminal behavior through employment opportunities and education is a more effective approach. By providing individuals with the means to support themselves and empowering them with education, we can create a safer and more harmonious society.

总之，虽然有些人主张延长监禁期限以减少犯罪，但我坚信通过就业机会和教育解决犯罪行

为的根本原因是更有效的方法。通过为个人提供养活自己的手段并赋予他们教育能力，我们可以创造一个更安全、更和谐的社会。

高分词组

advocate longer prison sentences | 提倡更长的监禁时间

alternative approaches | 替代方法

addressing the root causes of crime | 解决犯罪的根本原因

employment opportunities | 就业机会

viable solution | 可行的解决方案 fear of imprisonment | 对监禁的恐惧 underlying factors | 潜在因素 criminal activities | 犯罪活动

prolonging prison sentences | 延长监禁时间

societal stability | 社会稳定

struggle to reintegrate into society | 重新融入社会的挣扎

rates of recidivism | 累犯率

law-abiding society | 守法的社会

crime prevention | 犯罪预防

comprehensive education system | 全面的教育系统

moral values | 道德价值 financial instability | 财务不稳定 illegal means | 非法手段

temptation to engage in criminal activities | 参与犯罪活动的诱惑

Task: 科技发展减少还是促进了犯罪

Some people say that technological developments have reduced crime. Others say that they have encouraged crime.

Discuss both these views and give your own opinion.

While some argue that the advent of cutting-edge technology has decreased crime rates, others contend that it has facilitated an increase in criminal activities. From my perspective, I support the former claim due to the overarching benefits that technology brings to law enforcement and societal education.

虽然有人认为尖端技术的出现降低了犯罪率，但另一些人则认为它助长了犯罪活动的增加。

从我的角度来看，我支持前者的说法，因为技术为执法和社会教育带来了巨大的好处。

Opponents of technological advancements assert that these developments have provided new avenues for criminal activity, particularly in the cyber realm. The proliferation of online platforms means that personal information is often stored on digital mediums, from home addresses to banking details, making it accessible to cybercriminals skilled enough to bypass security measures. Moreover, technology has spawned novel forms of crime. In urban areas, devices designed to clandestinely scan and steal bank card information have emerged, highlighting the darker uses of technological progress.

反对技术进步的人声称，这些发展为犯罪活动提供了新的途径，特别是在网络领域。在线平

台的激增意味着个人信息通常存储在数字媒体上，从家庭住址到银行详细信息，网络犯罪分子只要足够熟练，可以绕过安全措施，就可以获取这些信息。此外，技术催生了新的犯罪形式。在城市地区，出现了用于秘密扫描和窃取银行卡信息的设备，突显了技术进步的黑暗用途。

Conversely, the advantages of technological developments in combating crime are substantial and manifold. Enhanced information collection tools have significantly expedited police response times, allowing for more efficient tracking and apprehension of suspects. Modern interrogation techniques, including the use of lie detection technology, have also become invaluable in assessing suspect testimonies.

相反，技术发展在打击犯罪方面的优势是巨大的，也是多方面的。增强的信息收集工具大大

加快了警方的反应时间，从而可以更有效地追踪和逮捕嫌疑人。现代审讯技术，包括测谎技术的使用，在评估嫌疑人证词方面也变得非常有价值。

In my opinion, technology's role extends beyond immediate law enforcement, it brings new educational methods to prevent crime. Through online learning platforms, individuals, regardless of geographical or socioeconomic barriers, can access educational resources. This widespread dissemination of knowledge fosters a more informed citizenry, capable of discerning right from wrong, thus potentially reducing the propensity to engage in criminal behavior.

在我看来，技术的作用不仅限于直接执法，它还带来了预防犯罪的新教育方法。通过在线学习平台，个人无论受到地理或社会经济障碍如何，都可以访问教育资源。这种知识的广泛传播培养了更知情的公民，使他们能够明辨是非，从而有可能降低从事犯罪行为的倾向。

In conclusion, although technology can inadvertently aid criminals, its role in advancing societal safety and criminal prevention is undeniable. The scale of its benefits far outweighs its misuse. Consequently, I maintain that technological advancements have, on balance, reduced crime, contributing significantly to both preventive measures and criminal apprehensions.

总之，尽管技术可能会无意中帮助犯罪分子，但它在促进社会安全和预防犯罪方面的作用是

不可否认的。其好处远远超过其滥用。因此，我认为技术进步总体上减少了犯罪，对预防措施和犯罪逮捕都做出了重大贡献。

高分词组

advent of cutting-edge technology | 尖端技术的出现

facilitated an increase in criminal activities | 促进了犯罪活动的增加

law enforcement and societal education | 执法和社会教育

new avenues for criminal activity | 新的犯罪途径

cyber realm | 网络领域

proliferation of online platforms | 在线平台的增多

digital mediums | 数字媒介

accessible to cybercriminals | 可供网络犯罪分子访问

bypass security measures | 绕过安全措施 novel forms of crime | 新型犯罪形式 clandestinely scan and steal | 秘密扫描和窃取

expedited police response times | 加快了警方的响应时间

efficient tracking and apprehension of suspects | 高效地跟踪和逮捕嫌疑人

modern interrogation techniques | 现代审讯技术

lie detection technology | 测谎技术

discerning right from wrong | 辨别是非

reducing the propensity to engage in criminal behavior | 减少从事犯罪行为的倾向

preventive measures and criminal apprehensions | 预防措施和犯罪逮捕

话题 3: 文化和社会

Task: 名人支持国际援助组织带来帮助还是坏处

Some people believe famous people's support towards international aid organizations draws the attention to problems, while others think celebrities make the problems less important.

Discuss both views and give your opinion.

The philanthropic gestures of celebrities to humanitarian organizations frequently draw attention from the media, sparking a debate on their impact. While some contend that the involvement of high-profile figures brings much-needed attention to critical issues, others believe that such celebrity influence can distract from the core problems. From my perspective, I contend that celebrity involvement may shift focus to the personalities involved rather than the causes they support.

名人对人道主义组织的慈善举动经常引起媒体的关注，引发了对其影响的争论。虽然有些人

认为高调人物的参与会给关键问题带来急需的关注，但另一些人认为，这种名人影响力会分散人们对核心问题的注意力。在我看来，我认为名人的参与可能会将焦点转移到所涉及的人物身上，而不是他们支持的事业上。

Proponents of celebrity involvement highlight the 'halo effect,' where the adulation fans have for their idols translates into mimicry, including charitable giving. The argument suggests that celebrities, through their substantial social media influence and following, can mobilize significant financial resources swiftly, channeling them into regions affected by disaster via international aid organizations.

名人参与的支持者强调“光环效应”，粉丝对偶像的崇拜转化为模仿，包括慈善捐赠。该论

点表明，名人通过其巨大的社交媒体影响力和追随者，可以迅速调动大量财政资源，通过国际援助组织将其引导到受灾地区。

However, this perspective neglects the fact that the overshadowing of underlying issues by the celebrities' acts of generosity. High-profile individuals often engage in philanthropy to enhance their public image and personal brand, inadvertently shifting the media's focus from the aid's effectiveness to their benevolence. This shift can dilute public interest in the outcomes of charitable initiatives, with the discourse around these efforts becoming entangled with celebrity gossip and speculation, potentially undermining the credibility and future efforts of the aid organizations involved.

然而，这种观点忽略了一个事实，即名人的慷慨行为掩盖了潜在问题。知名人士经常从事慈

善事业来提升自己的公众形象和个人品牌，无意中将媒体的关注点从援助的有效性转移到他们的善举上。这种转变可能会削弱公众对慈善活动成果的兴趣，围绕这些活动的讨论会与名人八卦和猜测纠缠在一起，可能会损害相关援助组织的信誉和未来努力。

From my standpoint, the drawbacks of celebrity endorsements for nonprofit organizations outweigh their benefits. Normally, considering the prioritization of self-image over assistance to those in need, such donations are more about personal branding than altruism. This approach can obscure the real intent behind philanthropy,

reducing it to a mere exercise in image management.

从我的角度来看，名人代言非营利组织的弊端大于其好处。通常，考虑到自我形象优先于对有需要的人的援助，这种捐赠更多的是个人品牌而非利他主义。这种方法可能会掩盖慈善背后的真正意图，将其简化为一种形象管理的练习。

In conclusion, the support of famous individuals for international aid organizations, while well-intentioned, may weaken the issues it aims to solve by focusing on donor motives and media narratives rather than on addressing the root causes. An approach that emphasizes anonymous donations could prove more effective in tackling these challenges head-on, ensuring that the spotlight remains firmly on the solutions, rather than on the personalities behind the contributions.

总之，名人对国际援助组织的支持虽然出于好意，但可能会削弱其旨在解决的问题，因为它

关注的是捐赠者的动机和媒体叙述，而不是解决根本原因。强调匿名捐赠的方式可能更有效地正面应对这些挑战，确保人们的注意力仍然集中在解决方案上，而不是捐款背后的人物身上。

高分词组

philanthropic gestures | 慈善行为 humanitarian organizations | 人道主义组织 draw attention | 吸引注意

high-profile figures | 高知名度人物

much-needed attention | 非常需要的关注

critical issues | 关键问题 celebrity influence | 名人影响 shift focus | 转移焦点

halo effect | 晕轮效应 adulation | 崇拜 mimicry | 模仿

charitable giving | 慈善捐赠

mobilize significant financial resources | 动员重要财务资源

channeling them into | 将资源投入

regions affected by disaster | 受灾地区 overshadowing of underlying issues | 掩盖根本问题 acts of generosity | 慷慨行为

enhance their public image | 提升公众形象

personal brand | 个人品牌

dilute public interest | 稀释公众兴趣

entangled with celebrity gossip | 与名人八卦纠缠

undermine the credibility | 破坏信誉 nonprofit organizations | 非营利组织 prioritization of self-image | 自我形象的优先 personal branding | 个人品牌建设

altruism | 利他主义

obscure the real intent | 掩盖真实意图

exercise in image management | 形象管理的行为

anonymous donations | 匿名捐赠

tackling challenges head-on | 直面挑战

spotlight remains on the solutions | 聚焦解决方案

Task: 人们是否应该出国旅游了解其他国家

Some people think it is necessary to travel abroad to learn about other countries, while others think that it is not necessary to travel abroad because the information can be seen on TV and on the Internet.

Discuss both opinions and give your own opinion.

With the advent of the internet, particularly short video platforms, virtual tours have increasingly become a popular means to experience exotic cultures from afar. While some consider this a time-efficient alternative to actual travel, I contend that it falls short in delivering unique personal experiences and suffers from biased representations.

随着互联网的出现，尤其是短视频平台的出现，虚拟旅游越来越成为一种从远处体验异国文

化的流行方式。虽然有些人认为这是一种比实际旅行更省时的选择，但我认为它无法提供独特的个人体验，而且存在偏见。

First and foremost, the essence of firsthand experience is irreplaceable. Diverse religions, values, and beliefs shape our perceptions of foreign cultures uniquely, something that the constrained and selective nature of social media cannot fully capture. For example, a virtual tour might highlight the architectural marvels of a city while neglecting the day-to-day experiences of its inhabitants, thus failing to provide a comprehensive understanding of the locale. This limitation restricts viewers from fully appreciating the depth and complexity of foreign cultures.

首先，亲身体验的本质是不可替代的。不同的宗教、价值观和信仰塑造了我们对外国文化的

独特看法，这是社交媒体的受限和选择性无法完全捕捉到的。例如，虚拟旅游可能会突出城市的建筑奇迹，而忽略其居民的日常经历，从而无法提供对当地的全面了解。这种限制限制了观众充分欣赏外国文化的深度和复杂性。

Moreover, the reliability of information presented through media is questionable due to inherent biases. The algorithms of digital platforms often create echo chambers, only showcasing content that aligns with previous searches, thereby obscuring a balanced view. For instance, repeated searches about the benefits of a national brand might exclude any negative aspects, leading to a skewed perception. Additionally, the commercial motives of some social media influencers may further distort reality. They might overemphasize the allure of tourist destinations to attract visitors, concealing any negative aspects to foster consumerism. This misrepresentation can lead to misconceptions about a culture or place.

此外，由于固有的偏见，通过媒体呈现的信息的可靠性值得怀疑。数字平台的算法通常会产

生回音室，只展示与之前的搜索一致的内容，从而掩盖了平衡的观点。例如，反复搜索某个 国家品牌的优点可能会排除任何负面影响，从而导致扭曲的看法。此外，一些社交媒体影响者的商业动机可能会进一步扭曲现实。他们可能会过分强调旅游目的地的吸引力来吸引游客，隐瞒任何负面影响以促进消费主义。这种歪曲会导致对某种文化或地方的误解。

Admittedly, the internet does offer a convenient shortcut to learning about different cultures, saving both time and effort. Nonetheless, the importance of direct, face-to-face interactions in truly understanding and appreciating another culture cannot be overstated. The nuanced insights gained from personal experiences, the spontaneous interactions with locals, and the sensory immersion in a new environment offer unparalleled learning opportunities that digital platforms cannot replicate.

不可否认，互联网确实为了解不同文化提供了一条便捷的捷径，既省时又省力。尽管如此，

直接面对面的互动对于真正理解和欣赏另一种文化的重要性怎么强调也不为过。从个人经历中获得的细微见解、与当地人的自发互动以及在新环境中的感官沉浸提供了数字平台无法复制的无与伦比的学习机会。

In conclusion, while digital exploration of foreign cultures offers convenience, it cannot substitute the profound, personal insights gained through physical travel. The limitations of virtual tours, including the lack of depth and potential biases, underscore the value of experiencing cultures firsthand. Traveling abroad, therefore, remains the most effective method to learn about and understand the diverse tapestry of global cultures, not just for the varied experiences it offers, but also for the more balanced and holistic perspective it provides.

总之，虽然数字化探索外国文化提供了便利，但它无法取代通过实地旅行获得的深刻的个人

见解。虚拟旅游的局限性，包括缺乏深度和潜在的偏见，凸显了亲身体验文化的价值。因此，出国旅行仍然是了解和理解全球多元文化的最有效方法，不仅因为它提供多样化的体验，也因为它提供更平衡、更全面的视角。

高分词组

virtual tours | 虚拟旅游

experience exotic cultures from afar | 从远处体验异国文化

biased representations | 有偏见的表现

essence of firsthand experience | 亲身经历的本质

diverse religions, values, and beliefs | 不同的宗教、价值观和信仰

architectural marvels | 建筑奇迹 reliability of information | 信息的可靠性 inherent biases | 固有偏见 commercial motives | 商业动机

distort reality | 扭曲现实 misrepresentation | 失实陈述 convenient shortcut | 方便的捷径 sensory immersion | 感官沉浸

Task: 组团旅游流行对目的地的人们和环境是好是坏

Organized tours to remote places and communities are increasingly popular.

Is it a positive or negative development for local people and the local environment ?

In the contemporary era, as tourist destinations in megacities become increasingly indistinguishable, a growing number of adventurers seek the allure of remote places and communities. Despite the appeal of such explorations, I argue that the drawbacks for local communities and the environment substantially overshadow any potential benefits, particularly concerning residents' privacy, cost of living escalations, and environmental degradation.

在当代，随着大城市的旅游目的地变得越来越难以区分，越来越多的冒险者寻求偏远地区和

社区的魅力。尽管这种探索很有吸引力，但我认为，对当地社区和环境的不利影响大大掩盖了任何潜在的好处，特别是在居民隐私、生活成本上升和环境恶化方面。

Firstly, the intrusion of tourists into these secluded areas often disrupts the daily lives of local inhabitants, making them feel like animals in the zoo for exhibiting. Tourists, driven by curiosity and the desire for unique experiences, frequently engage in invasive behaviors such as photographing private properties or intruding into homes under the guise of seeking an authentic experience. Furthermore, the phenomenon of virtue signaling by internet influencers, who often showcase local poverty to gain social capital, only adds to the disruption. This disturbs the peace of the locals.

首先，游客闯入这些僻静地区往往会扰乱当地居民的日常生活，让他们感觉自己就像动物园

里展览的动物。游客在好奇心和对独特体验的渴望的驱使下，经常进行侵入性行为，例如拍摄私人财产或以寻求真实体验为幌子闯入民宅。此外，网络影响者经常展示当地的贫困以获得社会资本，这种美德信号的现象只会增加混乱。这扰乱了当地人的安宁。

Moreover, the phenomenon of gentrification emerges as a significant drawback. The sudden influx of tourists can strain local resources, leading to skyrocketing prices and increased living costs. This economic pressure can be burdensome for the local population, sometimes forcing them to relocate. Such economic shifts, although benefiting a few, can destabilize the entire community.

此外，士绅化现象（这个词 gentrification，士绅化，可以积累一下，用在这个话题超级加

分。主要指一个地区，通常是乡村，由于更富裕人群迁入、住房改善和吸引新的产业入住，导致这个贫困地区的性质改变，并且通常会在此过程中取代现有居民。）也是一个重大的弊端。游客的突然涌入会给当地资源带来压力，导致物价飞涨和生活成本增加。这种经济压力可能会给当地居民带来沉重负担，有时甚至迫使他们搬迁。这种经济转变虽然使少数人受益，但却会破坏整个社区的稳定。

Environmental impact is another critical concern. Visitors often lack a sense of responsibility to protect the local environment, leading to irresponsible behaviors like littering or damaging natural habitats. The transient nature of their visit means they may

degraded.

环境影响是另一个关键问题。游客往往缺乏保护当地环境的责任感，导致乱扔垃圾或破坏自然栖息地等不负责任的行为。他们短暂的访问意味着他们可能不会面临其行为的长期后果，从而导致当地环境恶化。

While it is argued that tourism can stimulate local economies, the benefits are uncertain and often unevenly distributed. Governmental policies and initiatives may not adequately redirect tourism revenues towards improving local infrastructure or enhancing the quality of life for residents. Furthermore, any potential economic benefits are overshadowed by the irreversible environmental damage and cultural disruptions caused by tourism.

(这篇写的时候多发挥了下，如果考试时间来不及，这段可以不写)虽然有人认为旅游业可以

刺激当地经济，但其好处是不确定的，而且往往分布不均。政府的政策和举措可能没有充分将旅游收入用于改善当地基础设施或提高居民的生活质量。此外，任何潜在的经济利益都被旅游业造成的不可逆转的环境破坏和文化破坏所掩盖。

In conclusion, considering the adverse effects on local communities, economic burdens, and environmental degradation, it is evident that the rise of tourism in remote areas brings more harm than good. The pursuit of authentic experiences should not come at the expense of the communities and environments that host such adventures.

总之，考虑到对当地社区的不利影响、经济负担和环境恶化，显然偏远地区旅游业的兴起弊

大于利。追求真实的体验不应以牺牲举办此类冒险活动的社区和环境为代价。

高分词组

tourist destinations | 旅游目的地

increasingly indistinguishable | 越来越难以区分

residents' privacy | 居民隐私

cost of living escalations | 生活成本上升 environmental degradation | 环境退化 intrusion of tourists | 游客的侵扰 secluded areas | 偏僻地区

invasive behaviors | 侵入性行为

photographing private properties | 拍摄私人财产

authentic experience | 真实体验 gentrification | 士绅化/中产阶级化 skyrocketing prices | 飙升的价格

economic pressure | 经济压力 environmental impact | 环境影响 irresponsible behaviors | 不负责任的行为 long-term consequences | 长期后果 stimulate local economies | 刺激当地经济 unevenly distributed | 分配不均

irreversible environmental damage | 不可逆的环境破坏

cultural disruptions | 文化破坏

adverse effects | 负面影响

Task: 老人和年轻人哪个更重要

In some cultures elderly people are highly valued, while in some other cultures youth are more valued.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

In various cultures, the esteem for individuals of different age groups varies significantly. While some societies uphold a deep respect for their elderly, others emphasize the potential of the younger generation. In my perspective, both the elderly and the youth should be treated equally, as their distinct yet valuable contributions to our society.

在不同文化中，对不同年龄段个体的尊重程度存在很大差异。一些社会对老年人怀有深深的

敬意，而另一些社会则强调年轻一代的潜力。在我看来，老年人和年轻人都应该得到平等对待，因为他们对社会做出了独特而宝贵的贡献。

In nations with extensive histories and conservative traditions, venerating the elderly is deeply ingrained. China, for instance, places great importance on filial piety, urging children to heed the wisdom of their elders, and emphasizing the value of this wisdom in guiding conduct and decisions. This not only preserves cultural norms but also ensures societal stability through the acknowledgment of authority.

在历史悠久、传统保守的国家，对老年人的尊崇是根深蒂固的。例如，中国非常重视孝道，

鼓励孩子听从长辈的智慧，强调这种智慧在指导行为和决策方面的价值。这不仅维护了文化规范，而且通过承认权威确保了社会稳定。

Conversely, emerging cultures often prioritize the youth, recognizing their energy and innovative potential. For instance, individuals born in the 21st century, often referred to as digital residents, exhibit a deep understanding of advanced technologies at a young age. They often redefine the ways in which technology is used, driving innovation in every sector from education to industry. By harnessing their unique perspectives and digital skills, these young innovators are able to identify and implement solutions to complex problems, marking them pioneers in the quest for societal progression.

相反，新兴文化往往优先考虑年轻人，承认他们的活力和创新潜力。例如，出生于 21 世

纪的人通常被称为数字居民，他们在年轻时就对先进技术表现出深刻的理解。他们经常重新定义技术的使用方式，推动从教育到工业等各个领域的创新。通过利用他们独特的视角和数字技能，这些年轻的创新者能够找到并实施复杂问题的解决方案，使他们成为社会进步的先驱。

Despite these cultural disparities, I contend that both age groups should be accorded equal value due to their indispensable roles in societal development. While the elderly may not directly contribute tangible economic value, their wisdom and experiences create a cultural fabric that fosters harmony. Simultaneously, without the enthusiasm and fresh perspectives of the youth, society will risk development stagnation.

尽管存在这些文化差异，但我认为这两个年龄组应该得到同等重视，因为他们在社会发展中

发挥着不可或缺的作用。虽然老年人可能不会直接贡献有形的经济价值，但他们的智慧和经验创造了一种促进和谐的文化结构。同时，如果没有年轻人的热情和新视角，社会将面临发展停滞的风险。

In conclusion, although cultural attitudes may differ regarding the value placed on the elderly or the youth, it is essential to recognize the equal importance of both groups. They each contribute uniquely to the vibrancy and cohesion of our society, ensuring a balanced and progressive future.

总之，尽管文化态度在老年人和年轻人的价值方面可能有所不同，但必须认识到这两个群体

的同等重要性。他们各自为我们社会的活力和凝聚力做出了独特的贡献，确保了一个平衡和进步的未来。

高分词组

esteem for individuals | 对个人的尊重

different age groups | 不同年龄组

potential of the younger generation | 年轻一代的潜力 distinct yet valuable contributions | 独特而有价值的贡献 extensive histories | 悠久的历史

conservative traditions | 保守的传统 venerating the elderly | 尊敬老人 filial piety | 孝道

guiding conduct and decisions | 指导行为和决策

emerging cultures | 新兴文化 innovative potential | 创新潜力 digital residents | 数字居民 driving innovation | 推动创新 complex problems | 复杂问题

indispensable roles | 不可或缺的角色 cultural fabric | 文化结构 development stagnation | 发展停滞 vibrancy and cohesion | 活力和凝聚力

Task: 老年人的建议对当代年轻人有用吗

The older generations tend to have very traditional ideas about how people should live, think and behave. However, some people believe that ideas are not helpful in preparing younger generations for modern life.

To what extent do you agree or disagree with this view?

The debate over the relevance of older generations' traditional views in contemporary society is multifaceted. Some argue they fall short of addressing the complexities of modern life. However, I disagree with the opinion, and lean towards valuing these traditional insights, considering them not outdated things but treasures of wisdom essential for guiding the younger generation.

关于老一辈传统观点在当代社会中是否具有现实意义的争论是多方面的。有人认为，这些观

点无法解决现代生活的复杂性。然而，我不同意这种观点，我倾向于重视这些传统见解，认为它们不是过时的东西，而是指导年轻一代必不可少的智慧宝藏。

Supporters of traditional ideas argue that these ideas guide young people through life's challenges with wisdom accumulated over generations. For example, many successful individuals attribute their achievements to lessons learned from elder mentors who possessed extensive knowledge across various domains, a testament to the richness of lived experience that the youth, particularly students at the cusp of their careers, often lack. This historical wisdom, coupled with virtues such as patience, persistence, and diligence, is instrumental in molding the character of young individuals and preparing them to become conscientious members of society.

传统观念的支持者认为，这些观念以几代人积累的智慧指导年轻人应对生活中的挑战。例如，

许多成功人士将他们的成就归功于从拥有各个领域广泛知识的老导师那里学到的经验，这证明了年轻人，尤其是处于职业生涯巅峰的学生，往往缺乏丰富的生活经验。这种历史智慧，加上耐心、坚持和勤奋等美德，有助于塑造年轻人的性格，让他们成为有责任心的社会成员。

However, critics of this stance highlight that some traditional ideas may not align with the realities of modern life, potentially hindering the younger generation's ability to thrive in a globalized and digital world. For example, traditional views on career paths may steer young individuals towards more conventional professions, neglecting the opportunities in technology and creative industries. Despite these criticisms, it is essential to recognize that not all traditional ideas are incompatible with modern life. For instance, the principle of respect can be universally applied, fostering better interpersonal relationships and understanding across different cultures. Moreover, traditional ideas about hard work and perseverance are applicable, even in a rapidly changing world where adaptability is crucial.

然而，批评这种立场的人强调，一些传统观念可能与现代生活的现实不符，可能会阻碍年轻

一代在全球化和数字化世界中茁壮成长的能力。例如，传统的职业道路观可能会引导年轻人走向更传统的职业，忽视科技和创意产业的机会。尽管有这些批评，但必须认识到并非所有

传统观念都与现代生活格格不入。例如，尊重原则可以普遍适用，促进更好的人际关系和不同文化之间的理解。此外，即使在适应性至关重要的快速变化的世界中，关于勤奋和毅力的传统观念也是适用的。

In conclusion, these perspectives from the older generations offer invaluable life lessons for younger generations. By judiciously applying their insights while remaining adaptable to the context of contemporary society, we can ensure that the legacy of traditional values continues to enrich the lives of the younger generation.

总之，老一辈的这些观点为年轻一代提供了宝贵的人生教训。通过明智地运用他们的见解，

同时保持适应当代社会背景，我们可以确保传统价值观的遗产继续丰富年轻一代的生活。

高分词组

multifaceted | 多方面的

fall short of addressing | 未能充分解决 complexities of modern life | 现代生活的复杂性 traditional insights | 传统见解

guide through life's challenges | 引导应对生活挑战

wisdom accumulated over generations | 世代累积的智慧

testament to the richness of lived experience | 对丰富生活经验的证明 instrumental in molding the character | 在塑造性格上起到关键作用 conscientious members of society | 社会上有责任感的成员

align with the realities of modern life | 与现代生活的实际情况相符

career paths | 职业道路

principle of respect | 尊重原则

understanding across different cultures | 不同文化间的理解

hard work and perseverance | 勤奋和坚持

adaptability | 适应性

invaluable life lessons | 宝贵的生活教训

judiciously applying their insights | 明智地应用他们的见解

legacy of traditional values | 传统价值观的遗产

enrich the lives | 丰富生活

Task: 乡村人口向城市迁移

In many countries around the world, rural people are moving to cities, so the population in the countryside is decreasing.

Do you think this is a positive or a negative development?

Today, there is a prevailing trend in many countries where rural populations are migrating to urban centers. Consequently, the number of people residing in the countryside is experiencing a decline. From my perspective, this societal shift may have significant negative implications, not only for the rural economy but also for the overall living conditions in cities.

如今，许多国家都普遍存在农村人口向城市中心迁移的趋势。因此，居住在农村的人口数量

正在下降。在我看来，这种社会转变可能会产生重大的负面影响，不仅对农村经济，而且对城市的整体生活条件也是如此。

To begin with, the mass migration from rural to urban areas can severely impact the economic development of the countryside. As people leave their rural homes for cities, there is a depletion of the agricultural workforce, leading to a decline in agricultural productivity. Consequently, the local rural economy suffers a considerable setback, resulting in a widening economic gap between rural and urban regions. Additionally, the decreased agricultural output may contribute to an increased reliance on costly imported goods, burdening lower to middle-class families with higher daily expenses.

首先，从农村到城市的大规模迁移会严重影响农村的经济发展。随着人们离开农村前往城市，

农业劳动力的减少导致农业生产力下降。因此，当地农村经济遭受了相当大的挫折，导致城乡经济差距扩大。此外，农业产量下降可能导致对昂贵进口商品的依赖增加，使中低收入家庭的日常开支负担增加。

Moreover, the ramifications of this demographic shift extend beyond the rural areas, significantly affecting the living conditions in cities. One prominent concern is the escalating traffic congestion. An increased number of urban dwellers translates into heightened demand for private vehicles and public transportation, leading to more crowded roads, especially during peak hours. Consequently, urban air quality may deteriorate due to more vehicular emissions, further impacting the quality of life for city residents.

此外，这种人口结构变化的影响不仅限于农村地区，还严重影响了城市的生活条件。一个突

出的问题是交通拥堵加剧。城市居民数量的增加意味着对私家车和公共交通的需求增加，导致道路更加拥挤，尤其是在高峰时段。因此，由于车辆排放增加，城市空气质量可能会恶化，进一步影响城市居民的生活质量。

While some argue that urban migration can result in improved job opportunities and better access to essential services, such positive aspects must be balanced with potential drawbacks. In certain cases, rural areas may experience a decline in essential services and infrastructure as people migrate to urban centers, leading to an overall

decline in the quality of life for those who choose to remain in the countryside.

虽然有些人认为城市移民可以带来更好的就业机会和更好的基本服务，但这些积极方面必须与潜在的弊端相平衡。在某些情况下，随着人们迁移到城市中心，农村地区的基本服务和基础设施可能会减少，导致那些选择留在农村的人的生活质量整体下降。

In conclusion, the increasing trend of rural-to-urban migration may have far-reaching negative consequences, encompassing both economic ramifications for the rural population and a potential decline in living conditions in cities.

总之，农村向城市迁移的趋势日益增加可能会产生深远的负面影响，既包括对农村人口的经

济影响，也包括城市生活条件的潜在下降。

高分词组

prevailing trend | 流行趋势

rural populations | 农村人口

migrating to urban centers | 迁移到城市中心

societal shift | 社会转变 rural economy | 农村经济 mass migration | 大规模迁移

depletion of the agricultural workforce | 农业劳动力的流失

agricultural productivity | 农业生产力

local rural economy suffers | 当地农村经济受损

widening economic gap | 经济差距扩大

costly imported goods | 昂贵的进口商品

burdening lower to middle-class families | 使中低收入家庭负担加重

demographic shift | 人口转变

escalating traffic congestion | 交通拥堵加剧

heightened demand for private vehicles | 对私家车需求增加

public transportation | 公共交通

vehicular emissions | 车辆排放

deteriorate urban air quality | 恶化城市空气质量

access to essential services | 获得基本服务的途径

decline in essential services and infrastructure | 基本服务和基础设施的衰退

Task: 新建住宅还是修复老建筑

The restoration of old buildings in major cities throughout the world often involves numerous government expenditure. This money will bring more benefits if it is used to provide new housing or road development.

To what extend do you agree or disagree.

As the government's expenditure on restoring old buildings continues to rise, some suggest this money would be better spent on providing new housing or road development. However, I disagree with the notion. In my view, the restoration of old buildings can have a more positive impact on major cities, as it is more sustainable and reinforces the identity of a city.

随着政府在修复旧建筑方面的支出不断增加，有人认为这些钱最好用来提供新住房或道路开

发。但我不同意这种观点。在我看来，修复旧建筑可以对大城市产生更积极的影响，因为它更具可持续性，并能强化城市的身份。

To begin with, major cities often face significant challenges in meeting the housing and transportation needs of their growing populations. While investing in new housing and road development might appear to address these demands, it leads to continuous government spending and can exacerbate environmental issues, such as pollution and resource depletion. In contrast, restoring old buildings might require a larger initial investment, but it offers a more sustainable solution. This approach minimizes the impact on the environment by reducing the need for new construction materials and the resultant waste.

首先，大城市在满足不断增长的人口的住房和交通需求方面往往面临重大挑战。虽然投资新

住房和道路开发似乎可以满足这些需求，但它会导致政府持续支出，并可能加剧环境问题，如污染和资源枯竭。相比之下，修复旧建筑可能需要更大的初始投资，但它提供了一个更可持续的解决方案。这种方法通过减少对新建筑材料的需求和由此产生的废物，最大限度地减少了对环境的影响。

Moreover, old buildings bear witness to the history and stories of the past, regardless of their external appearance. By restoring these structures, we demonstrate our commitment to preserving the city's heritage and promoting a deeper understanding of its roots. On the contrary, solely focusing on new development might neglect the rich historical context that old buildings carry, leading to a loss of cultural identity and heritage in major cities.

此外，无论外观如何，旧建筑都见证了过去的历史和故事。通过修复这些建筑，我们展示了

我们保护城市遗产和促进对其根源更深入了解的决心。相反，只关注新开发可能会忽视旧建筑所承载的丰富历史背景，导致大城市文化特征和遗产的丧失。

In conclusion, while some argue that investing in new housing or road development would bring more benefits, I firmly believe that the restoration of old buildings offers a more sustainable and culturally enriching solution for major cities.

总之，虽然有些人认为投资新住房或道路开发会带来更多好处，但我坚信，修复旧建筑为大城市提供了更可持续、文化更丰富的解决方案。

高分词组

government's expenditure | 政府开支 restoring old buildings | 修复旧建筑 providing new housing | 提供新住房 sustainable | 可持续的

reinforces the identity of a city | 加强城市的身份

significant challenges | 重大挑战

transportation needs | 交通需求

continuous government spending | 持续的政府支出 exacerbate environmental issues | 加剧环境问题 pollution and resource depletion | 污染和资源枯竭 sustainable solution | 可持续的解决方案

minimizes the impact on the environment | 最小化对环境的影响

new construction materials | 新的建筑材料

resultant waste | 产生的废物

bear witness to | 证明

history and stories of the past | 过去的历史和故事 preserving the city's heritage | 保存城市的遗产 promoting a deeper understanding | 促进更深入的理解 rich historical context | 丰富的历史背景

loss of cultural identity and heritage | 文化身份和遗产的丧失

culturally enriching solution | 文化丰富的解决方案

Task: 越来越多人对了解他们居所的历史感兴趣的原因和了解的方法

In some countries, more and more people are becoming interested in finding out about the history of the house or building they live in.

What are the reasons for this? How can people research this?

It is increasingly prevalent in certain countries that uncover the history of buildings and residences. In my view, this trend is underpinned by a heightened sense of attachment to one's home and the curiosity for historical context.

在某些国家，这种现象越来越普遍，人们开始发掘建筑和住宅的历史。在我看来，这种趋势

是由人们对家乡的依恋感和对历史背景的好奇心所推动的。

The surge in curiosity about the past of one's house can be attributed to two prominent rationales. Firstly, there is an escalating sense of attachment to one's hometown, particularly to their abode. As this sense of belonging deepens, so does the desire to unravel the history tied to their dwelling. Having experienced cultural disparities abroad, I found solace in reminiscing about my hometown and the comfort it provided. This sense of belongingness is a driving force behind the quest to unearth the historical context of one's home. Additionally, a surge in curiosity about history motivates individuals to engage in exploring the historical backdrop of their residences. In this context, investigating the history of their dwelling becomes an accessible route for quenching their thirst for historical knowledge.

人们对房屋过去的好奇心激增，可以归因于两个主要原因。首先，人们对家乡的依恋感不断

加深，尤其是对自己的住所。随着这种归属感的加深，人们想要解开与住所相关的历史的愿望也随之加深。在国外经历过文化差异后，我回忆家乡和它提供的舒适感，找到了慰藉。这种归属感是人们探索家乡历史背景的驱动力。此外，对历史的好奇心激增，促使人们探索住所的历史背景。在这种情况下，调查住所的历史成为满足他们对历史知识渴望的一种可行途径。

Plenty of approaches can be undertaken to gain insight into this history. A particularly effective strategy is narratives from local residents who have witnessed the entire transformation of their community. This method offers a genuine and firsthand perspective that might otherwise be overlooked. In addition, for those seeking a more systematic and objective source of information, libraries serve as invaluable storage places of historical records.

可以采取多种方法来深入了解这段历史。一种特别有效的策略是听取当地居民的叙述，他们

见证了社区的整个转变。这种方法提供了真实的、第一手的视角，否则可能会被忽视。此外，对于那些寻求更系统、更客观的信息来源的人来说，图书馆是宝贵的历史记录存储场所。

In conclusion, the recent surge in people's fascination with the history of their homes is attributed to their deepening sense of connection and growing interest in their past. This curiosity is supported by various methodologies, including engaging with local residents

and accessing historical archives.

总之，最近人们对家乡历史的迷恋激增，归因于他们日益加深的联系感和对过去日益增长的兴趣。这种好奇心得到了各种方法的支持，包括与当地居民接触和访问历史档案。

高分词组

increasingly prevalent | 日益普遍

uncover the history | 揭开历史

heightened sense of attachment | 加强的依恋感

historical context | 历史背景

surge in curiosity | 好奇心激增

escalating sense of attachment | 不断升级的依恋感

sense of belonging | 归属感 unravel the history | 揭开历史 cultural disparities | 文化差异

solace in reminiscing | 回忆中的慰藉

driving force | 驱动力

quest to unearth | 探索发掘的追求 historical backdrop | 历史背景 accessible route | 可行的途径

quenching their thirst for | 满足他们的渴望

gain insight into | 深入了解

narratives from local residents | 当地居民的叙述 witnessed the entire transformation | 见证了整个变革 firsthand perspective | 第一手视角

systematic and objective source | 系统和客观的来源

historical records | 历史记录

deepening sense of connection | 加深的连接感 engaging with local residents | 与当地居民接触 accessing historical archives | 访问历史档案

Task: 政府应该为穷人提供免费住房吗

Houses are essential for people. Some people think that the government should offer free houses for people who cannot afford to pay for it.

Do you agree or disagree with this statement?

In recent times, soaring housing prices have become a pressing concern for many individuals. While some advocate for free houses to be provided for the less privileged, I disagree with this idea. From my perspective, the government should offer subsidized housing options rather than granting them entirely free.

近年来，房价飞涨已成为许多人迫切关注的问题。虽然有些人主张为弱势群体提供免费住房，

但我不同意这种想法。从我的角度来看，政府应该提供补贴住房选择，而不是完全免费。

To begin with, it is essential to acknowledge that not everyone in need requires a fully free house. Rental accommodations can be a viable solution for those who find it challenging to bear the burden of purchasing a property. For instance, a growing number of young individuals opt for rental housing, appreciating the financial flexibility and mobility it affords them in response to changing work demands and locations.

首先，必须承认，并不是每个有需要的人都需要完全免费的房子。对于那些难以承担购房负

担的人来说，租房可能是一个可行的解决方案。例如，越来越多的年轻人选择租房，因为他们欣赏租房为他们提供的财务灵活性和流动性，以应对不断变化的工作需求和地点。

Moreover, it is crucial to acknowledge the limitations of the government's budget and resources. Allocating all funds to provide entirely free houses may impede other critical investments in education, technology, and public transportation that benefit society as a whole. Furthermore, offering homes for free might inadvertently foster a sense of dependency among the less fortunate, potentially dampening their motivation to work hard and strive for financial independence.

此外，承认政府预算和资源的局限性也至关重要。将所有资金用于提供完全免费的住房可能

会阻碍对教育、技术和公共交通等其他有益于整个社会的关键投资。此外，免费提供住房可能会无意中培养弱势群体的依赖感，从而削弱他们努力工作和争取经济独立的动力。

While it is the government's responsibility to ensure a reasonable standard of living for its citizens, providing houses entirely free of charge might not be the most practical approach. Instead, the government should focus on implementing measures to reduce housing prices and make homeownership more accessible. For example, introducing policies to regulate the housing market and encourage affordable housing development can be instrumental in achieving this goal.

虽然政府有责任确保公民享有合理的生活水平，但完全免费提供住房可能不是最实际的做法。

相反，政府应该专注于实施降低房价和让购房更容易的措施。例如，出台政策来规范住房市场和鼓励经济适用房的发展，可以有助于实现这一目标。

In conclusion, while the housing affordability crisis necessitates governmental intervention, providing entirely free houses to people may not be the most effective solution. I firmly believe that the government should prioritize offering subsidized housing options and implement policies to alleviate the burden of housing costs for those in need.总之，虽然住房负担能力危机需要政府干预，但完全免费向人们提供住房可能不是最有效的解决方案。我坚信政府应该优先提供补贴住房选择，并实施政策减轻有需要的人的住房成本负担。

高分词组

soaring housing prices | 高涨的房价

pressing concern | 迫切关注

the less privileged | 较少特权的群体 subsidized housing options | 补贴住房选项 rental accommodations | 租赁住宿 financial flexibility | 财务灵活性

mobility | 移动性

limitations of the government's budget | 政府预算的限制

critical investments | 关键投资

sense of dependency | 依赖感 motivation to work hard | 努力工作的动力 financial independence | 财务独立

reasonable standard of living | 合理的生活标准 practical approach | 实际方法 homeownership | 房屋拥有权

housing market | 房地产市场

affordable housing development | 可负担住房发展

alleviate the burden of housing costs | 减轻住房成本的负担

Task: 发达国家应该向人们引入新的科技还是提供免费的教育以提高生活质量

Some people think that governments in developing countries should introduce new technologies to people in order to improve the quality of life, while others believe that in order to achieve that governments should offer free education for all.

Discuss both these views and give your own opinion.

It is a topic of considerable debate whether the introduction of cutting-edge technologies by governments in developing countries is more beneficial for enhancing the quality of life, or whether offering free education for all is a superior approach. While both propositions have their merits, I lean towards the integration of new technologies as a more effective means of improving living standards.

发展中国家政府引进尖端技术是否更有利于提高生活质量，还是为所有人提供免费教育是一

种更好的方法，这是一个备受争议的话题。虽然这两种主张都有其优点，但我更倾向于将新技术融入其中，将其作为提高生活水平的更有效手段。

On one hand, the provision of free education is undoubtedly advantageous, potentially elevating the collective knowledge base of a society. It could lead to long-term socio-economic benefits, such as higher employment rates. However, the practicality of implementing universal free education poses significant challenges. Such an initiative might strain government budgets, necessitating increased taxation which, paradoxically, could lower disposable income and, by extension, the standard of living. Additionally, ensuring uniform quality of education across various regions remains a formidable challenge, potentially exacerbating educational disparities rather than alleviating them.

一方面，提供免费教育无疑是有利的，有可能提升社会的集体知识基础。它可以带来长期的

社会经济效益，例如更高的就业率。然而，实施全民免费教育的可行性带来了重大挑战。这样的举措可能会给政府预算带来压力，需要增加税收，而这反而会降低可支配收入，进而降低生活水平。此外，确保各地区教育质量统一仍然是一项艰巨的挑战，可能会加剧而不是缓解教育差距。

On the other hand, the introduction of new technologies offers a more immediate impact on daily life. The automation of mundane and laborious tasks, for instance, could free individuals from monotonous work, allowing them to engage more in meaningful pursuits. This transition can significantly enhance the general well-being of a population.

另一方面，新技术的引入对日常生活产生了更直接的影响。例如，将单调乏味的任务自动化，

可以将人们从单调的工作中解放出来，使他们能够更多地从事有意义的活动。这种转变可以显著提高人口的总体福祉。

From my perspective, the advent of innovative technologies such as advanced 3D gaming, versatile electronic devices, and multifunctional computer applications enriches people's lives in diverse ways. These technologies not only offer entertainment but also pave the way for educational engagement, granting users convenient access to internet resources and finding extensive applications in online education.

在我看来，先进的 3D 游戏、多功能电子设备和多功能计算机应用程序等创新技术的出现以多种方式丰富了人们的生活。这些技术不仅提供娱乐，还为教育参与铺平了道路，使用户能够方便地访问互联网资源，并在在线教育中找到广泛的应用。

In conclusion, while the provision of free education holds substantial potential benefits, the immediate and varied impacts of introducing new technologies make it a more pragmatic and effective approach to improving life quality in developing countries. It is through these technologies that individuals can experience a significant reduction in work-related stress and a substantial increase in recreational and personal development opportunities.

总之，虽然提供免费教育具有巨大的潜在好处，但引入新技术的直接和多种影响使其成为改

善发展中国家生活质量的更务实和有效的方法。正是通过这些技术，个人可以显著减少与工作相关的压力，并大幅增加娱乐和个人发展的机会。

高分词组

cutting-edge technologies | 尖端技术

superior approach | 更优的方法

integration of new technologies | 新技术的整合 provision of free education | 提供免费教育 collective knowledge base | 共同知识库 higher employment rates | 更高的就业率 universal free education | 全民免费教育 government budgets | 政府预算

increased taxation | 增税 disposable income | 可支配收入 standard of living | 生活标准

uniform quality of education | 教育的均等质量

educational disparities | 教育差异

automation of mundane and laborious tasks | 日常和劳累任务的自动化

monotonous work | 单调的工作

versatile electronic devices | 多功能电子设备

convenient access to internet resources | 方便访问互联网资源

Task: 是否应该频繁换工作

People have different expectations for their job. Some people prefer to do the same job for the same company, while others prefer to change jobs frequently.

Discuss both these views and give your own opinion.

Today, people have different views on career stability. While some prefer sticking to the same job within a single company, others believe that regularly changing jobs is essential. In my opinion, I agree with the idea of changing jobs frequently, as it helps us to keep competitiveness.

如今，人们对职业稳定性有着不同的看法。有些人喜欢在一家公司内坚持做同一份工作，而

另一些人则认为定期换工作是必不可少的。在我看来，我同意频繁换工作的想法，因为它有助于我们保持竞争力。

On one hand, being in the same job for an extended period can enable individuals to unlock their full potential and expertise in that specific field. For example, consider a software developer who remains with the same company for many years. Over time, he not only perfected his coding and technical skills but also gained an intimate understanding of the company's products, culture, and processes. This level of expertise contributes to heightened self-assurance and a profound sense of belonging within the team.

一方面，长期从事同一份工作可以使个人充分发挥他们在特定领域的潜力和专业知识。例如，

假设一位软件开发人员在同一家公司工作多年。随着时间的推移，他不仅完善了自己的编码和技术技能，还对公司的产品、文化和流程有了深入的了解。这种专业水平有助于增强自信心和对团队的深刻归属感。

On the other hand, constantly switching jobs exposes individuals to diverse industries and roles, enabling them to acquire a wide range of skills.
